# la cifra de

## Descripción

I found this cipher in an old book. Can you figure out what it says? Connect with nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 53677.
## Solución

- Usando cyberchef

```
picoCTF{b311a50_0r_v1gn3r3_c1ph3rb0896BFE}
```

picoCTF{b311a50_0r_v1gn3r3_c1ph3rb0896BFE}
## Notas adicionales

Buscamos la llave del cifrado usando fuerza bruta.
## Referencias

https://www.guballa.de/vigenere-solver
https://gchq.github.io/CyberChef/#recipe=Vigen%C3%A8re_Decode('flag')&&oenc=65001
